attacking_style: Stage-hunting time trial specialist who targets late-GT ITTs rather than road stages. Preserves energy through early weeks to peak for specific TT opportunities.
team_tactics: Operates independently as protected stage hunter rather than GC support; team allows anonymous positioning through road stages to conserve watts for TT efforts.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling individual time trials in final week of Grand Tours when accumulated fatigue creates opportunity against favorites. Exposed on mountain stages.
vulnerability: Three-week road stages where anonymity suggests inability to compete; likely struggles when required to contribute to team tactics before target TT stages.
key_patterns: Deliberately anonymous through GT road stages to preserve form for late-race time trial
Peaks timing perfectly for final week ITT after three weeks of energy conservation
Capable of beating pure TT specialists when fresh legs meet their accumulated fatigue
form_trajectory: unknown: Single observation shows successful peaking strategy but insufficient data for trajectory assessment
